concerns.text: FR-002 (parse smoke.yaml/public_session_full.yaml) lacks a dedicated task. T002 installs dependencies but does not explicitly task the implementation of the YAML parser logic required to dynamically adjust pipeline scope as mandated by FR-002.

FR-004 (execute evaluation protocol scoring artifacts) is not explicitly covered. T020 orchestrates the run, but no task explicitly implements the scoring logic for the 5 dimensions (artifact_delivery, visual_quality, cost, runtime, skill_transfer) required by FR-004 and US-2 AC-1.

FR-006 (aggregate results to generate statistics) is partially covered by T027/T028, but T029 implements a 'relative proportion' check which contradicts the spec's strict '<5% variance' requirement in SC-004. A task explicitly implementing the variance calculation logic for SC-004 is missing.

US-1 Edge Case (malformed input handling) is addressed in T015/T017, but FR-001 requires the system to execute the full pipeline sequence without manual intervention. No task explicitly covers the 'Pack Validate' and 'Export' stages mentioned in FR-001's list of required stages, potentially leaving the end-to-end sequence incomplete.

Task T029 references 'SC-004 Revised' in its description. The spec.md defines SC-004 with a strict <5% variance requirement. The plan.md revises this to 'structural trends' due to sample size. The task should reference the plan's specific limitation or the revised success criteria explicitly to avoid confusion, rather than a non-existent 'SC-004 Revised' ID.
